word: G4243 - πρεσβεύω - presbeúō - pres-byoo'-o - Be an ambassador

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be an ambassador
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to be older, prior by birth or in age
2. to be an ambassador, act as an ambassador
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the base of G4245; to be a senior, that is, (by implication) act as a representative (figuratively preacher): - be an ambassador.
